name: BOF / Retargeting - Brittani-HB-Why-I-love - Educational - Why I Love - Music + On Screen Text - Hyperburn - Brittani - Female - 20s - 20sec - Copy A

creative.body:
For the past few months I’ve been using HyperBurn every day, and it has been working wonders for me. 😍

I’m more toned, have more energy and less cravings!

Give it a try for 30 days, you won’t regret it.

https://www.onesthealth.com.au/products/hyperburn

*Results may vary.
creative.title: This Is My Secret Weapon
